description: A control room operator for an underground coal mine monitors the progress of a longwall shearer.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the real-time position and status of the longwall shearer as it cuts along the coal face.

expected_outcome.value: The operator has a live view of the shearer's location and operational parameters.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert that the shearer has stopped due to high methane levels detected at the face.

expected_outcome.value: The operator acknowledges the safety alert.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the system has automatically increased ventilation to the face and wait for methane levels to drop before authorizing a restart.

expected_outcome.value: The operator follows safety procedures, waiting for the gas levels to be clear before resuming operations.
